item.dc:creator: TheTremorsSaga

item.title: A Navy SEAL was convinced exposure to blasts damaged his brain, so he donated it to science to prove it.
item.description: The 29-year-old Navy SEAL was convinced years of exposure to blasts had badly damaged his brain, despite doctors telling him otherwise. An autopsy revealed microscopic scars on Ryan Larkin's brain similar to those from the blast of a bomb. But he hadn't experienced one. Instead, his injuries came from repeated, low-level shocks from his own weapons, including during his time as a trainer. more info: https://www.nbcnews.com/news/us-news/son-died-warning-military-brain-injuries-many-years-mass-shooting-late-rcna143146
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: Winston's second week in his forever home
item.description:
Two weeks ago we rescued a 6-8 year old pit after 6 months at the local rescue. He was insanely thin and had basically given up, but under those sad eyes is the sweetest, most loving boy that I have ever met. Here's the story of week one: https://imgur.com/gallery/COSqrDy
His closet nest where he likes his bed. He still spends most of his time here but he's very safe and happy.
Loves to hide his nose/face while he sleeps
Sometimes he tries to be a ghost. He's not very good at it.
Loves slow walks at the park behind our house. He doesn't move quick, but his nose is always working overtime
Checking out an old groundhog hole
Loves car rides
Watching over his kingdom. He hasn't barked or whined a single time. We're still not sure if he can even make noise.
Loves his mama more than anything in the world.
The best smile ever!!! I fall in love every time I see it! As always, Winston reminds you to spay/neuter/microchip your pets!
item.dc:creator: OO00OO00

item.title: The Devastating Photographs of Edward Burtynsky
item.description:
Burtinsky is my favorite photographer. His decade spanning career focuses on the impact humans have had on their environment and his work is designed to be viewed in a much larger format than the constraints of an online gallery, but it's still impressive. This tire wasteland is in California.
Shipbreaking in Bangladesh.
Deep Sea oil rig fire
Dam across the Yangtze in China
My favorite series of his was the quarries. The geometry is very compelling.
Factory Workers
More Factory workers
Bangladesh again
Salt basins
Rag pickers among the bottles
Possibly my favorite of all his images. Huge and terrifying. For a sense of scale, there are four humans standing on the right hand side of the image along the top of the wall, just in front of the first tube.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

Mercutio (Harold Perrineau) is mortally wounded defending Romeo Montague (Leonardo DiCaprio)
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: What Happened Today #77
item.description: The silence is growing because speaking out gets punished. This week, a sitting senator in his own party said she’s afraid of the repercussions from opposing Trump. A retired cybersecurity official quit his private job to defend himself against an improper government probe. Reporters at NBC and the AP are being sidelined. Agencies are being ignored. He is even threatening to fire the Fed Chair, authority he doesn't have. And truth is being twisted, buried, or discredited. Trump isn’t just wielding power. He’s training people to fear it. So speak. Show up. Push back. That’s how fear breaks. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/vanhollen-abregogarcia 2. https://go.govbrief.today/wilkinson-abregogarcia 3. https://go.govbrief.today/houthi-fuel-depot 4. https://go.govbrief.today/nic-tda 5. https://go.govbrief.today/cfpb-layoffs 6. https://go.govbrief.today/birthright-scotus 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-powell 8. https://go.govbrief.today/ap-pool-appeal 9. https://go.govbrief.today/ullyot-resignation 10. https://go.govbrief.today/hill-nih 11. https://go.govbrief.today/lindell-irs 12. https://go.govbrief.today/murkowski-afraid 13. https://go.govbrief.today/marine-commercial 14. https://go.govbrief.today/hud-building 15. https://go.govbrief.today/lopez-gomez 16. https://go.govbrief.today/fcc-comcast 17. https://go.govbrief.today/krebs-fight
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.dc:creator: xbadxfaeriex

item.title: You guys rock! Keep it up Imgur
item.description: We got nominated for best hard rock album in our local music awards show, which was amazing, and something we've been trying to do for years. We didn't win, but that's okay, it was a huge honor to even be nominated. We couldn't have done it without the help of this community. The feedback, tips, etc over the years has helped make the music, and the recordings better every time, and I think that was a huge part if it. Thanks so much for your continued help and support. Now that our drummer is back after rotator cuff surgery, here is our latest release off the 12th album: https://youtu.be/D9X1wI0q1FI?si=CQJuOnB9p7TD92LZ
item.dc:creator: FromTheBeyond

item.title: Fuck off, RFK Jr.
item.description:
Ice cream is my little giant’s favorite food. It’s his favorite treat. His nightly ritual.
RFK Jr spewed hateful and awful rhetoric about a topic he does not understand. Every person can add value to our society, you ableist fuck. Some people with autism do have jobs, pay taxes, write poetry, and go on dates. Some do not. No matter what, they are humans. Isn’t he supposed to be in charge of the agency that aids people with disabilities? I know, we are all shocked a Trump appointee isn’t qualified. Please excuse his messy room in the background. It was picked up the next day. PS RFK’s family lobotomized his aunt who had intellectual disabilities. They shoved her in an institution before that.
item.dc:creator: CarpetheCarp
